name: jira-sprint-workflow
description: End-to-end Jira sprint workflow for Claude Code teams. Two skills: (1) jira-story-design brainstorms a feature, embeds the spec in Jira, generates an implementation plan, and creates 11 self-contained subtasks; (2) jira-story-execute autonomously walks the chain to Done, pausing only at the human manual-test checkpoint, with full resumability from Jira state.

jira_url.description: Your Jira Cloud base URL, e.g. https://myteam.atlassian.net

jira_username.description: Your Jira account email (used with the API token for Basic auth)

jira_api_token.description: Your Jira API token — generate at https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens

project_key.description: The Jira project key where Stories and Subtasks will be created (e.g. WFR, ENG, TECH)

default_owner_account_id.description: Default assignee for parent Tasks and Subtask 7 (Manual Testing). Use Jira account ID, not email. Find yours at https://<your-jira>.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/myself

components.description: Comma-separated list of your Jira Components / product areas (e.g. 'Backend,Frontend,Infrastructure'). Create these via Jira Project Settings → Components if they don't exist.

plans_directory.description: Repo path (relative to your working copy) where implementation plans and test plans are stored. Default: docs/superpowers/plans

specs_directory.description: Repo path where design specs are stored. Default: docs/superpowers/specs
